metadata.description: The Media OS for Claude Code — 96 production skills covering FFmpeg complete, OBS, broadcast IP (NDI, DeckLink, Dolby Vision, HDR10+), GStreamer/MediaMTX, WebRTC, VFX, and 2026 open-source AI media. Plus 13 workflow skills, 7 orchestrator agents, 4 safety hooks, and 3 PATH-level CLIs (moprobe, moqc, mosafe). Every skill is a sealed folder — copy one into ~/.claude/skills/ or install the whole plugin.

plugins.name: media-os
plugins.description: Complete Media OS — 96 production skills + 13 workflow skills + 7 orchestrator agents + 4 safety hooks + 3 PATH-level CLIs (moprobe, moqc, mosafe) + incoming-media watcher. FFmpeg complete, OBS Studio, GStreamer/MediaMTX, broadcast IP (NDI/DeckLink/Dolby Vision/HDR10+), control protocols (MIDI/OSC/DMX/PTZ), system audio routing, VFX, computer vision, WebRTC, and 2026 open-source AI media (Real-ESRGAN, RIFE, Kokoro TTS, FLUX-schnell, LTX-Video, Depth-Anything, LivePortrait, PaddleOCR).
